queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the association between the absence of a known savings account and reduced credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical investigation into the contribution of lacking a checking account towards increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of credit stability regarding savings balances below 100 DM and their impact on decreasing risk exposure.
